productDisplayName: BIBA Women Solid Navy Blue Kurta
description: Composition Blue round neck kurta made of 100% cotton twill, has cotton lining, a hook and eye fastening on neckline, embellishments around neckline, three quarter length sleeves with embellished cuffs and long vents at sides with embellishment Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron This kurta from biba is made of cotton twill fabric which has a lovely diagonal pattern in the weave. The neckline, cuffs and vents are decorated with beautiful embroidery and piping in navy blue which sings out against the blue background. Wear this over leggings or over trousers depending on the occasion. Smart enough to wear to the office or to a formal party, dress this kurta up by wearing bold earrings and bangles. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
